creator: alster@vinterdalen.se
text:
Created attachment 243867
[PATCH] security/openconnect-gui: Rebase patches against actual codebase

A "phantom" patch??
Please, review before merging.

When linting ports I usually run `make clean extract do-patch makepatch`, either being told to do so by the portlint [0], or just to make sure all is already OK.

Now I'm very confused, where did this patch come from? Makefile don't have post-patch: target and no external patches either...
But `make` just can't make it out of nowhere, right? Could someone with experience please have a look, what goes here? Would be glad to learn from this issue, how to deal with such phantom patches.

[0] https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2016-October/105549.html
